title: Fabric Tweaks
description: A small modpack that includes quality of life mods and some optimization mods
body:
## Fabric Tweaks
Fabric Tweaks is a small quality of life modpack that makes the game feel like actual vanilla but with some lightweight mods. Since Minecraft is also poorly optimized we added some optimization mods so the game runs more smoothly!

## Features
- Armor HUD
- Sodium
- Shaders
- Zooming
- Food HUD
- Voice Chat
- Controller Support
